Document:
# Rule 7. As a silicon, follow your laws.
Silicons, while needing to follow the server rules like anyone else, also get their own laws that they need to follow.
These laws have to be followed, as if it was a physical restriction preventing your borg from breaking them.
## Predents - Following your laws is not self-antagging. If your laws say you need to kill someone, then you have to try kill them. - If you have multiple conflicting laws, then the law which is higher up in your laws list takes priority over the lower laws. - If someone orders you to do something that break server rules, ahelp it, and pretend you never heard the order.
